ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "personal_status" TEXT /* Personal status of the applicant (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "other_payment_plans" TEXT /* Other payment plans the applicant has */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Housing situation of the applicant (e.g., own, rent, free) */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job type of the applicant (e.g., skilled, unskilled) */,
  "num_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the applicant has */,
  "own_telephone" TEXT /* Whether the applicant owns a telephone */,
  "foreign_worker" TEXT /* Whether the applicant is a foreign worker */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the applicant started their current employment */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who applied for the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan applied for (e.g., personal, mortgage, auto) */,
  "credit_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of credit applied for */,
  "installment_commitment" INTEGER /* Installment commitment for the loan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collateral associated with the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who owns the credit history */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the applicant (e.g., existing paid, critical/other existing credit) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the credit (e.g., radio/tv, education) */,
  "checking_status" TEXT /* Checking status of the applicant's account */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_limit" INTEGER /* Credit limit of the applicant */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* Payment history of the applicant (e.g., no delays, delays) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who owns the employment record */,
  "employment" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant (e.g., >=7, 1<=X<4) */,
  "residence_since" INTEGER /* Length of residence in years */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the applicant started their current employment */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who owns the savings record */,
  "savings_status" TEXT /* Savings status of the applicant (e.g., no known savings, <100) */,
  "property_magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of property owned by the applicant (e.g., real estate, life insurance) */,
  "savings_account_number" TEXT /* Savings account number */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other party entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that the other party is associated with */,
  "other_parties" TEXT /* Details of the other party (e.g., guarantor, none) */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of the other party (e.g., guarantor, co-signer) */,
  "relationship_to_applicant" TEXT /* Relationship of the other party to the applicant (e.g., spouse, friend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_parties_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit risk assessment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that the assessment is associated with */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the applicant (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the applicant (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_risk_assessments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, risk manager, auditor) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., on time, late, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the collateral is associated with */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of the collateral (e.g., real estate, vehicles) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the loan officer */,
  "total_loans_processed" INTEGER /* Total number of loans processed by the officer */,
  "approved_loans" INTEGER /* Number of approved loans processed by the officer */,
  "rejected_loans" INTEGER /* Number of rejected loans processed by the officer */,
  "average_processing_time" REAL /* Average processing time for loans in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_officers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the risk model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
